title: Automated creation of new item with due date two days after creation
excerpt: I have set up an automation that creates a new item every week on Monday. For the Item I can specify a date, but every item that will be created week after week will have the same date I set the first time. I would like …

posts.author: DarkerWing (Claudio Vallan)
posts.cookedHtml: I have set up an automation that creates a new item every week on Monday. For the Item I can specify a date, but every item that will be created week after week will have the same date I set the first time. I would like that the due date of this new item each time is the Wednesady after the item has been created. Is there a way to do that?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@DarkerWing

If your current automation is the only way that items are created on that board, you can use a custom automation like this:

image1090×214 13.3 KB

If there are other ways that items are created, you will need to add an identifying status column, say “Type”. Then you can adjust this automation like this:

image1082×268 17.5 KB

Jim - Subscribe to The Monday Man
